subcodes.first_line: O youthful servant of the All-Merciful! The trace of thy pen, which writeth the truth, expressed thy servitude at His Holy Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان رحمانی اثر کلک حقیقت نگار که در بیان عبودیت آستان مقدس ترجمه حال
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
